Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Eric Chaichnelachvili .
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Thomas Spano is present.
Attorney Deepa Varma representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Philip Keith, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
